title: Kuma’s Promise to Bonney
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Bonney, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Kuma, Vegapunk as Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.
scene: Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Granny Conney made an extra special giant pizza for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Woo hoo!! Thanks!! i love it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So good!! 🙂

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Nothing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There's still no letter...

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Daddy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm nine now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You said you'd write...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And so, another half a year passed without a single letter reaching the church...

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Kuma came to the rescue again?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, it's just like all those other times. The revolutionary forces were on the ropes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then he swooped in to save us at the last minute. After that, he left without saying a word!!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: If Kuma wishes not to be followed,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We have to respect that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Kuma- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm sure he has his reasons...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...for keeping us in the dark.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm all better!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Look! The stones are completely gone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I CAN FINALLY GO OUTSIDE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not a chance, Bonney-chan! You must stay put!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've been told to keep you under close supervision until your 10th birthday!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You liar!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vegapunk said I'd be fine after a year...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And that was a year ago!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I forbid it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alpha and the others are government intelligence agents...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Wha-?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They let it slip while they were getting drinks in town.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Apparently, your disease has been cured for a while now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Really?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We must be missing some- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why would they keep a perfectly healthy young girl trapped inside for another six months?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, I find it hard to believe that Kuma wouldn't send a single letter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've already sorted every- thing out with gyogo and the others.

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: Head for the Port, Bonney!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sail the seas, and go find your father!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Can I really do it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GYogyo and the rest aren't your average fishermen!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They're a strong pack of hooligans...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure the pirates and sea beasts will turn tail once they see them in action!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm going back to the palace.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll be there to help you find Kuma!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I see. Take care.

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney Flashback through 45 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
